ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API key for an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Encrypted at rest with a per-device key; the encrypted blob is what lands in data.json. Re-enter on each device.
ast.target: 用于兼容 OpenAI 的端点的 API 密钥。使用设备专属密钥进行静态加密；加密后的数据块存储在 data.json 中。请在每台设备上重新输入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base URL for an OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint.
ast.target: 兼容 OpenAI 的聊天补全端点的基础 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sent as the system message on every macro call. Empty falls back to the built-in default.
ast.target: 作为系统消息在每次宏调用时发送。留空则回退到内置默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many characters of preceding note text to include as grounding.
ast.target: 包含多少个前文笔记字符作为上下文依据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters that begin a macro. Default: !!
ast.target: 开始一个宏的字符。默认值：!!

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters that close a macro and trigger the call. Default: !
ast.target: 关闭宏并触发调用的字符。默认值：!

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Implicit macros: stored API key could not be decrypted on this device. Re-enter it in plugin settings.
ast.target: 隐式宏：存储的 API 密钥无法在此设备上解密。请在插件设置中重新输入。
